<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Symfony\Component\Mailer\Transport\Smtp\Auth; use Symfony\Component\Mailer\Transport\Smtp\EsmtpTransport; /** * Handles LOGIN authentication. * * @author Chris Corbyn */ class LoginAuthenticator implements AuthenticatorInterface { public function getAuthKeyword(): string { return 'LOGIN'; } /** * @see https://www.ietf.org/rfc/rfc4954.txt */ public function authenticate(EsmtpTransport $client): void { $client->executeCommand("AUTH LOGIN\r\n", [334]); $client->executeCommand(\sprintf("%s\r\n", base64_encode($client->getUsername())), [334]); $client->executeCommand(\sprintf("%s\r\n", base64_encode($client->getPassword())), [235]); } }
